reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy the game in all its aspects when playing against AI.
However when I try the multiplayer option it doesn't work at all, I wait for a long time for someone to join the game but I was never able to play against another user online. I understand players cannot always be available, but I tried many many times and this has never worked. It is such a shame as it's in my opinion the best game out there for meta quest. I cannot try the multiplayer friends as none of my friends have this game. Note for the developers: Please try to make an effort to make this work in multiplayer as it's a great game overall.

Tennis On-Court has exciting graphics and excellent physics. The option for reviewing a rally with a birds eye view is a wonderful addition. I use only the AI opponent at this time. This app works both on Quest 3 and Quest Pro.

Great, then gives a replay that gives vertigo and motion sickness all in one go. I am prone to both of these...game plays great, and then I nearly fall over before I can press skip...please make this an option. I find this game in arcade mode very playable.....I prefer very playable and fun to being realistic. Great game...except.....

Great game when playing AI player, but I really wanted to play friends, every time I invite a friend, we get the the players lounge then the game drops out. Have tried many times in singles & doubles, just doesn’t seem to work…. Disappointed.. Developer-has now fixed the issue, thanks so much…game is great.

This game has potential but falls really short. I was hoping that the description was accurate but it seems to be a wish list. The features are there but most not working correctly or not at all. 
I tried to contact developers but so far have been none responsive. 
It appears that they have not addressed any of the problems in the last year or so. 
I’ve only been able to play with avatars, no one seems to be online. I understand that there aren’t many people playing the game. It appears that the developers have abandoned this game hence no response from them.
Very disappointed.

The game was working fine, just until this month it started to have moving issues and lagging.

You can only play with the avatar, sadly you can’t find anyone online!

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We had a strange issue. Update the game and that will be ok.
Thanks for your patience.

reviews.review_description: Great tennis game!! The AI opponent moves very realistically and the match atmosphere sounds are fun and dynamic. Can choose between 4 or 5 levels of AI difficulty and the matches are very customizable so you can have shorter or longer matches. Can also choose between many different locations that have their own unique courts to play on. Move options are teleport, auto move or manual with the stick. Using manual mode is my favorite due to being able to move fast if you hold the grab button in while using the stick. Matches are way more fun and engaging for me this way. The physics are fantastic and the game doesn’t get repetitive or boring because of all the customization and incredibly fun gameplay.  You can choose between arcade or simulation but I’ve only played on simulation because I like the extra challenge and it keeps me motivated to keep getting better. Thank you for creating what is now my favorite sports game on the quest! I’m already looking forward to tomorrow’s matches and doing more training modes. 😊

1. The graphics is not good on my Q2.
2. The physics is quite good once you get used to it, one of the best in the market.
3. The winner shot  replay is such a cool feature.
This game has potential, please keep making it better.

It’s cool to have the choice between realistic and arcade gameplay.
We have fun with friends in playing doubles match all together :)
Better than all other Tennis games here.

I hadn't even realized the game was also available on the Quest. I like sports/tennis games, so I compare it to first person tennis. It's different and the hits are a little more delicate. A bit like Racket Club. 
Things I don't understand yet are how to change the avatar. I can't select anything to change. The AI ​​opponents are to weak in AI-solo play, and even in the professional setting they make serving errors too constantly. 
However, they are more difficult again in the Solo-tournament, even in the first/easiest one? 
I havn't found a single multiplayer match. But because of the solo tournament its still worth a buy if you like tennis in vr.
It's a good game, not 5 stars but a solid 4 stars that looks very polished. On the Quest 3 i recommend to increase the resolution a bit with the games optimizer.

reviews.review_title: I’m not having fun, code to try
reviews.review_description:
I wanted to like this game so bad. I can’t. Because it’s not a game. Perhaps a simulation, but not a game.
I don’t feel like I’m progressing, I don’t feel that the customisation of my avatar is useful enough (just make me change the color of my hands is enough because the diversity and inclusion over there is super awkward), I don’t feel like in the Wii back in the days nor the field.
I can’t keep this game in my library.

developer_response.body:
Hello Sa.-.ah
Thanks for your feedback.
The goal of Tennis On-Court is to be a simulation. So you're right, we are not wii tennis :)
Did you try the Arcade gameplay which is a lot more accessible for people doesn't look realism ?

reviews.review_description: Lovely surprise to see this game come out on the Quest 2. Looks great, lots of polish and physics look good. Are there any contact details for the devs ? I have some questions. Not sure what the grip stick stuff is all about. I am hoping it means you can use tennis attachments like the Helloreal proswing ? Having a discord or email contact would be good.

developer_response.body:
Hello ! :)
If you have any questions, don't hesitate to send an email : tennisoncourtvr@gmail.com
For the moment, we don't manage the accessories. But we have this feature in the roadmap.
Have a great day !

reviews.review_description:
The physics is really close to the reality. 
It's very helpful to train every day.
I like playing matches in the stadiums with a full audience in the grandstands.
you can also play in doubles with 3 humans. Love the ideal! I need find partners.
If you wish it, you can switch between arcade and reality gameplay.
It needs a lot of work to develop the physics, I am a tennis player and I don’t like it at all. Don’t wast your money on bad physics. Hopefully I can refund it.

developer_response.body:
Hello Trabold, thanks for your comment.
We are quite surprised, we have playtested the game with a lot of tennis players coming from beginners to great players. And their feedbacks were really positive.
